690+ suffix = if length(claims) > 1, do: " · #{length(claims)} claims", else: ""
691+
692+ warn =
693+ if meets,
694+ do: "",
695+ else:
696+ ~S| <span class="strength-warn" title="Below the required strength for this requirement (see verification_minimum_strength or --min-strength)">⚠</span>|
697+
698+ ~s|<span class="strength-badge strength-#{str}"#{title_attr(tooltip(:strength, str))}>#{label}#{suffix}</span>#{warn}|
699+ end
700+
701+ defp render_strength_legend do
702+ ~s"""
703+ <div class="strength-legend" aria-label="Strength legend">
704+ <span class="strength-badge strength-executed"#{title_attr(tooltip(:strength, "executed"))}>EXECUTED</span>
705+ <span class="strength-legend-arrow">›</span>
706+ <span class="strength-badge strength-linked"#{title_attr(tooltip(:strength, "linked"))}>LINKED</span>
707+ <span class="strength-legend-arrow">›</span>
708+ <span class="strength-badge strength-claimed"#{title_attr(tooltip(:strength, "claimed"))}>CLAIMED</span>
709+ <span class="strength-legend-arrow">›</span>
710+ <span class="strength-badge strength-uncovered"#{title_attr(tooltip(:strength, "uncovered"))}>UNCOVERED</span>
711+ <span class="strength-legend-note">strongest evidence wins per requirement</span>
712+ </div>
713+ """
714+ end
715+
716+ defp render_covering_claims([]), do: ""
717+
718+ defp render_covering_claims(claims) do
719+ [
720+ ~S|<ul class="claim-list">|,
721+ Enum.map(claims, fn c ->
722+ kind = c["kind"] || ""
723+ target = c["target"] || ""
724+ strength = c["strength"] || "claimed"
725+
726+ ~s"""
727+ <li class="claim">
728+ <span class="pill pill-neutral"#{title_attr(tooltip(:verification_kind, kind))}>#{h(kind)}</span>
729+ <code class="claim-target">#{h(target)}</code>
730+ <span class="strength-badge strength-#{strength}"#{title_attr(tooltip(:strength, strength))}>#{String.upcase(strength)}</span>
731+ </li>
732+ """
733+ end),
734+ ~S|</ul>|
735+ ]
736+ end
737+
738+ defp render_bindings_section(bindings) when bindings == %{} or is_nil(bindings), do: ""
739+
740+ defp render_bindings_section(bindings) do
741+ [
742+ ~s|<h4 class="tab-heading">Bindings (realized_by)</h4>|,
743+ ~S|<dl class="bindings">|,
744+ Enum.map(bindings, fn {tier, mfas} ->
745+ mfas = List.wrap(mfas)
746+
747+ [
748+ ~s|<dt>#{h(to_string(tier))}</dt>|,
749+ ~s|<dd><ul class="mfa-list">|,
750+ Enum.map(mfas, fn mfa -> ~s|<li><code>#{h(mfa)}</code></li>| end),
751+ ~S|</ul></dd>|
752+ ]
753+ end),
754+ ~S|</dl>|
755+ ]
756+ end
757+
758+ defp render_verification_section(nil), do: ""
759+ defp render_verification_section([]), do: ""
760+
761+ defp render_verification_section(list) when is_list(list) do
762+ [
763+ ~s|<details class="raw-verification">|,
764+ ~s|<summary class="raw-verification-summary">Raw spec-verification block (#{length(list)} entr#{if length(list) == 1, do: "y", else: "ies"})</summary>|,
765+ ~S|<p class="raw-verification-explainer">The author's declarations as written in the spec file. The per-requirement view above is computed from this.</p>|,
766+ ~S|<ul class="verification-list">|,
767+ Enum.map(list, fn v ->
768+ kind = field(v, :kind) || ""
769+ target = field(v, :target) || ""
770+ covers = field(v, :covers) || []
771+ execute = field(v, :execute) || false
772+
773+ ~s"""
774+ <li class="verification">
775+ <div class="verification-header">
776+ <span class="pill pill-neutral"#{title_attr(tooltip(:verification_kind, kind))}>#{h(kind)}</span>
777+ <code class="verification-target">#{h(target)}</code>
778+ #{if execute, do: ~s|<span class="pill pill-success"#{title_attr(tooltip(:execute, true))}>executes</span>|, else: ~s|<span class="pill pill-muted"#{title_attr(tooltip(:execute, false))}>declared</span>|}
779+ </div>
780+ <div class="verification-covers">
781+ #{Enum.map_join(covers, " ", fn c -> ~s|<span class="pill pill-cover">#{h(c)}</span>| end)}
782+ </div>
783+ </li>
784+ """
785+ end),
786+ ~S|</ul>|,
787+ ~S|</details>|
788+ ]
789+ end
790+
791+ @doc false
792+ def render_decisions_tab(%{decision_refs: []}, _adrs) do
793+ ~S|<p class="empty-tab">No ADRs referenced by this subject.</p>|
794+ end
795+
796+ def render_decisions_tab(%{decision_refs: refs}, adrs) do
797+ [
798+ ~s|<h4 class="tab-heading">ADRs referenced (#{length(refs)})</h4>|,
799+ ~S|<div class="adr-list">|,
800+ Enum.map(refs, fn id -> render_adr_disclosure(id, Map.get(adrs || %{}, id)) end),
801+ ~S|</div>|
802+ ]
803+ end
804+
805+ defp render_adr_disclosure(id, nil) do
806+ ~s"""
807+ <details class="adr">
808+ <summary class="adr-summary">
809+ <code class="adr-id">#{h(id)}</code>
810+ <span class="adr-title-missing">unknown ADR (not found in index)</span>
811+ </summary>
812+ </details>
813+ """
814+ end
815+
816+ defp render_adr_disclosure(_id, adr) do
817+ status_pill =
818+ if adr.status, do: ~s|<span class="pill pill-neutral">#{h(adr.status)}</span>|, else: ""
819+
820+ date_chip =
821+ if adr.date, do: ~s|<span class="adr-date">#{h(adr.date)}</span>|, else: ""
822+
823+ change_type_pill =
824+ if adr.change_type,
825+ do: ~s|<span class="pill pill-cover">#{h(adr.change_type)}</span>|,
826+ else: ""
827+
828+ change_chip =
829+ case Map.get(adr, :change_status) do
830+ :new -> ~S|<span class="chip chip-new">NEW</span>|
831+ :modified -> ~S|<span class="chip chip-modified">MODIFIED</span>|
832+ :removed -> ~S|<span class="chip chip-removed">REMOVED</span>|
833+ _ -> ""
834+ end
835+
836+ ~s"""
837+ <details class="adr adr-#{Map.get(adr, :change_status, :unchanged)}">
838+ <summary class="adr-summary">
839+ #{change_chip}
840+ <code class="adr-id">#{h(adr.id)}</code>
841+ <span class="adr-title">#{h(adr.title)}</span>
842+ #{status_pill}#{change_type_pill}#{date_chip}
843+ </summary>
844+ <div class="adr-body-wrap">
845+ <div class="markdown-body">#{render_markdown(adr.body_text)}</div>
846+ #{if adr.file, do: ~s|<div class="adr-source"><code>#{h(adr.file)}</code></div>|, else: ""}
847+ </div>
848+ </details>
849+ """
850+ end
851+
852+ # Renders a markdown string as HTML using Earmark with safe defaults.
853+ # The leading H1 (the ADR title) is stripped because the title already
854+ # appears in the disclosure summary, so duplicating it is noise.
855+ defp render_markdown(text) when is_binary(text) do
856+ stripped = strip_leading_h1(text)
857+
858+ case Earmark.as_html(stripped, escape: true, compact_output: false) do
859+ {:ok, html, _} -> html
860+ {:error, html, _messages} -> html
861+ end
862+ end
863+
864+ defp render_markdown(_), do: ""
865+
866+ defp strip_leading_h1(text) do
867+ text
868+ |> String.split("\n", parts: 2)
869+ |> case do
870+ ["# " <> _, rest] -> String.trim_leading(rest, "\n")
871+ [first, rest] -> first <> "\n" <> rest
872+ [single] -> single
873+ end
874+ end
875+
876+ defp render_decisions_changed([]) do
877+ ~S"""
878+ <section id="decisions-changed" class="decisions-changed" aria-label="Decisions changed">
879+ <h2 class="section-heading">Decisions changed (0)</h2>
880+ <p class="empty-tab">No ADR files changed in this change set.</p>
881+ </section>
882+ """
883+ end
884+
885+ defp render_decisions_changed(decisions) do
886+ [
887+ ~s|<section id="decisions-changed" class="decisions-changed" aria-label="Decisions changed">|,
888+ ~s|<h2 class="section-heading">Decisions changed (#{length(decisions)})</h2>|,
889+ ~S|<ul class="decision-changed-list">|,
890+ Enum.map(decisions, fn d ->
891+ ~s"""
892+ <li>
893+ <code>#{h(d.id || d.file)}</code>
894+ #{if d.status, do: ~s|<span class="pill pill-neutral">#{h(d.status)}</span>|, else: ""}
895+ #{if d.change_type, do: ~s|<span class="pill pill-neutral">#{h(d.change_type)}</span>|, else: ""}
896+ #{if d.affects != [], do: ~s|<span class="affects">affects: #{Enum.map_join(d.affects, ", ", &h/1)}</span>|, else: ""}
897+ </li>
898+ """
899+ end),
900+ ~S|</ul>|,
901+ ~S|</section>|
902+ ]
903+ end
904+
905+ defp render_unmapped([]) do
906+ ~S"""
907+ <section id="misc" class="misc" aria-label="Outside the spec system">
908+ <h2 class="section-heading">Outside the spec system (0)</h2>
909+ <p class="empty-tab">All file changes in this change set map to a spec subject.</p>
910+ </section>
911+ """
912+ end
913+
914+ defp render_unmapped(changes) do
915+ paths = Enum.map(changes, & &1.file)
916+ tree = build_path_tree(paths)
917+
918+ diff_blocks =
919+ Enum.map(changes, fn %{file: file, lines: lines} ->
920+ anchor = "misc-" <> slug(file)
921+
922+ ~s"""
923+ <details class="code-change" id="#{anchor}" open>
924+ <summary class="filename"><code>#{h(file)}</code></summary>
925+ #{IO.iodata_to_binary(render_diff_block(lines, language_for(file)))}
926+ </details>
927+ """
928+ end)
929+
930+ [
931+ ~s|<section id="misc" class="misc" aria-label="Outside the spec system">|,
932+ ~s|<h2 class="section-heading">Outside the spec system (#{length(changes)})</h2>|,
933+ ~S|<p class="misc-explainer">These files changed but do not map to any spec subject. Triangulation does not apply here — review the diff directly.</p>|,
934+ render_files_section(tree, "misc", "Files (#{length(paths)})", diff_blocks),
935+ ~S|</section>|
936+ ]
937+ end
938+
939+ # ----------------------------------------------------------------------
940+ # Path tree
941+ # ----------------------------------------------------------------------
942+
943+ # Builds a nested map representing a folder/file tree from a list of paths.
944+ # Leaves are tagged {:file, full_path} for anchor linking.
945+ defp build_path_tree(paths) do
946+ Enum.reduce(paths, %{}, fn path, tree ->
947+ parts = path |> String.split("/") |> Enum.reject(&(&1 == ""))
948+ insert_path(tree, parts, path)
949+ end)
950+ end
951+
952+ defp insert_path(tree, [leaf], full_path) do
953+ Map.put(tree, leaf, {:file, full_path})
954+ end
955+
956+ defp insert_path(tree, [head | rest], full_path) do
957+ sub =
958+ case Map.get(tree, head) do
959+ nil -> %{}
960+ existing when is_map(existing) -> existing
961+ # Should not happen unless a path collides with a directory name;
962+ # treat as a fresh subtree.
963+ _ -> %{}
964+ end
965+
966+ Map.put(tree, head, insert_path(sub, rest, full_path))
967+ end
968+
969+ defp render_files_section(tree, anchor_prefix, heading, diff_blocks) do
970+ ~s"""
971+ <div class="files-section" data-tree-section>
972+ <div class="file-tree-rail" aria-hidden="false">
973+ <aside class="file-tree-panel" aria-label="File tree">
974+ <header class="file-tree-header">
975+ <span class="file-tree-title">#{h(heading)}</span>
976+ <button class="file-tree-close" type="button" aria-label="Hide file tree" data-tree-action="close">×</button>
977+ </header>
978+ <div class="file-tree-scroll">
979+ #{IO.iodata_to_binary(render_tree_nodes(tree, anchor_prefix))}
980+ </div>
981+ </aside>
982+ <button class="file-tree-handle" type="button" aria-label="Show file tree" data-tree-action="open">
983+ <span class="file-tree-handle-icon" aria-hidden="true">▸</span>
984+ </button>
985+ </div>
986+ <div class="files-list">
987+ #{IO.iodata_to_binary(diff_blocks)}
988+ </div>
989+ </div>
990+ """
991+ end
992+
993+ defp render_tree_nodes(tree, anchor_prefix) do
994+ items =
995+ tree
996+ |> Enum.sort_by(fn {name, value} ->
997+ # Folders before files at the same level.
998+ case value do
999+ {:file, _} -> {1, name}
1000+ _ -> {0, name}
1001+ end
1002+ end)
1003+ |> Enum.map(fn
1004+ {name, {:file, full_path}} ->
1005+ anchor = anchor_prefix <> "-" <> slug(full_path)
1006+
1007+ ~s"""
1008+ <li class="tree-leaf">
1009+ <a href="##{anchor}" data-tree-leaf><code>#{h(name)}</code></a>
1010+ </li>
1011+ """
1012+
1013+ {name, sub_tree} when is_map(sub_tree) ->
1014+ ~s"""
1015+ <li class="tree-folder">
1016+ <details open>
1017+ <summary class="tree-folder-summary"><code>#{h(name)}/</code></summary>
1018+ #{IO.iodata_to_binary(render_tree_nodes(sub_tree, anchor_prefix))}
1019+ </details>
1020+ </li>
1021+ """
1022+ end)
1023+
1024+ [~S|<ul class="tree">|, items, ~S|</ul>|]
1025+ end
1026+
1027+ defp render_diff_block([], _lang) do
1028+ ~S|<p class="empty-tab">(no diff content)</p>|
1029+ end
1030+
1031+ defp render_diff_block(lines, lang) do
1032+ {rows, _state} =
1033+ Enum.flat_map_reduce(lines, %{old: 0, new: 0}, fn entry, state ->
1034+ render_diff_row(entry, state, lang)
1035+ end)
1036+
1037+ [~S|<div class="diff">|, rows, ~S|</div>|]
1038+ end
1039+
1040+ # File-header lines (`diff --git ...`, `--- a/...`, `+++ b/...`) are
1041+ # noise once the filename is shown in the disclosure summary above.
1042+ defp render_diff_row({:file_header, _text}, state, _lang), do: {[], state}
1043+
1044+ defp render_diff_row({:hunk_header, text}, _state, _lang) do
1045+ new_state = parse_hunk_header(text)
1046+
1047+ row =
1048+ ~s|<div class="diff-row diff-row-hunk"><span class="diff-lineno"></span><span class="diff-lineno"></span><span class="diff-marker"></span><span class="diff-content">#{h(text)}</span></div>|
1049+
1050+ {[row], new_state}
1051+ end
1052+
1053+ defp render_diff_row({:add, text}, %{new: n} = state, lang) do
1054+ new_no = n + 1
1055+ content = strip_diff_marker(text, "+")
1056+
1057+ row =
1058+ ~s|<div class="diff-row diff-row-add"><span class="diff-lineno"></span><span class="diff-lineno diff-lineno-new">#{new_no}</span><span class="diff-marker">+</span>#{render_diff_content(content, lang)}</div>|
1059+
1060+ {[row], %{state | new: new_no}}
1061+ end
1062+
1063+ defp render_diff_row({:del, text}, %{old: o} = state, lang) do
1064+ old_no = o + 1
1065+ content = strip_diff_marker(text, "-")
1066+
1067+ row =
1068+ ~s|<div class="diff-row diff-row-del"><span class="diff-lineno diff-lineno-old">#{old_no}</span><span class="diff-lineno"></span><span class="diff-marker">−</span>#{render_diff_content(content, lang)}</div>|
1069+
1070+ {[row], %{state | old: old_no}}
1071+ end
1072+
1073+ defp render_diff_row({:ctx, text}, %{old: o, new: n} = state, lang) do
1074+ old_no = o + 1
1075+ new_no = n + 1
1076+ content = strip_diff_marker(text, " ")
1077+
1078+ row =
1079+ ~s|<div class="diff-row diff-row-ctx"><span class="diff-lineno">#{old_no}</span><span class="diff-lineno">#{new_no}</span><span class="diff-marker"></span>#{render_diff_content(content, lang)}</div>|
1080+
1081+ {[row], %{state | old: old_no, new: new_no}}
1082+ end
1083+
1084+ defp render_diff_content(content, nil),
1085+ do: ~s|<span class="diff-content">#{h(content)}</span>|
1086+
1087+ defp render_diff_content(content, lang),
1088+ do: ~s|<code class="diff-content language-#{lang}">#{h(content)}</code>|
1089+
1090+ # Maps a file path to a Prism language class. Returns nil for files
1091+ # whose language we don't ship a lexer for; those render without
1092+ # syntax highlighting.
1093+ defp language_for(file) when is_binary(file) do
1094+ case file |> Path.extname() |> String.downcase() do
1095+ ".ex" -> "elixir"
1096+ ".exs" -> "elixir"
1097+ ".eex" -> "elixir"
1098+ ".heex" -> "elixir"
1099+ ".leex" -> "elixir"
1100+ ".erl" -> "erlang"
1101+ ".hrl" -> "erlang"
1102+ ".json" -> "json"
1103+ ".yaml" -> "yaml"
1104+ ".yml" -> "yaml"
1105+ ".md" -> "markdown"
1106+ ".markdown" -> "markdown"
1107+ ".css" -> "css"
1108+ ".scss" -> "css"
1109+ ".html" -> "markup"
1110+ ".htm" -> "markup"
1111+ ".xml" -> "markup"
1112+ ".svg" -> "markup"
1113+ ".sh" -> "bash"
1114+ ".bash" -> "bash"
1115+ ".diff" -> "diff"
1116+ ".patch" -> "diff"
1117+ _ -> nil
1118+ end
1119+ end
1120+
1121+ defp language_for(_), do: nil
1122+
1123+ defp strip_diff_marker(<<marker::utf8, rest::binary>>, expected) do
1124+ if <<marker::utf8>> == expected, do: rest, else: <<marker::utf8>> <> rest
1125+ end
1126+
1127+ defp strip_diff_marker(text, _), do: text
1128+
1129+ defp parse_hunk_header(text) do
1130+ case Regex.run(~r/@@ -(\d+)(?:,\d+)? \+(\d+)(?:,\d+)? @@/, text) do
1131+ [_, old_start, new_start] ->
1132+ %{old: String.to_integer(old_start) - 1, new: String.to_integer(new_start) - 1}
1133+
1134+ _ ->
1135+ %{old: 0, new: 0}
1136+ end
1137+ end
1138+
1139+ # ----------------------------------------------------------------------
1140+ # Helpers
1141+ # ----------------------------------------------------------------------
1142+
1143+ @doc false
1144+ def h(nil), do: ""
1145+ def h(value) when is_binary(value), do: html_escape(value)
1146+ def h(value), do: value |> to_string() |> html_escape()
1147+
1148+ # Tooltip text by (category, value). Returns "" when nothing useful applies
1149+ # so the caller can render `title="..."` unconditionally.
1150+ defp tooltip(:strength, "executed"),
1151+ do: "Command verification ran and exited 0 (requires --run-commands)"
1152+
1153+ defp tooltip(:strength, "linked"),
1154+ do:
1155+ "File-kind verification: target file exists and contains the requirement id; or tagged_tests: a test in the suite carries @tag spec for the requirement"
1156+
1157+ defp tooltip(:strength, "claimed"),
1158+ do:
1159+ "A spec-verification entry names the requirement in its covers: list. Textual claim only — nothing else has been checked."
1160+
1161+ defp tooltip(:strength, "uncovered"),
1162+ do: "No spec-verification entry covers this requirement."
1163+
1164+ defp tooltip(:priority, "must"), do: "Required (RFC 2119)"
1165+
1166+ defp tooltip(:priority, "should"),
1167+ do: "Recommended; can be skipped with explicit justification (RFC 2119)"
1168+
1169+ defp tooltip(:priority, "may"), do: "Optional (RFC 2119)"
1170+
1171+ defp tooltip(:stability, "stable"), do: "Wording is settled; unlikely to change shape"
1172+
1173+ defp tooltip(:stability, "evolving"),
1174+ do: "Wording is being tightened or restructured; expect churn"
1175+
1176+ defp tooltip(:verification_kind, "command"),
1177+ do: "Runs an arbitrary command. Reaches EXECUTED when the command exits 0 with --run-commands."
1178+
1179+ defp tooltip(:verification_kind, "tagged_tests"),
1180+ do:
1181+ "Reaches LINKED when a test carries @tag spec for the requirement; EXECUTED when that test ran and passed."
1182+
1183+ defp tooltip(:verification_kind, kind)
1184+ when kind in ~w(file source_file test_file guide_file readme_file workflow_file test doc workflow contract) do
1185+ "Asserts the named #{String.replace(kind, "_", " ")} exists. Reaches LINKED when its content references the requirement id."
1186+ end
1187+
1188+ defp tooltip(:execute, true),
1189+ do: "execute: true — eligible to run during --run-commands"
1190+
1191+ defp tooltip(:execute, false),
1192+ do: "execute: false — declared only; will not run automatically"
1193+
1194+ defp tooltip(:change, :new), do: "Added in this change set"
1195+ defp tooltip(:change, :modified), do: "Modified in this change set"
1196+ defp tooltip(:change, :removed), do: "Removed in this change set"
1197+ defp tooltip(:change, :new_subject), do: "This subject's spec file did not exist on the base ref"
1198+ defp tooltip(:change, :spec_edited), do: "The subject's .spec.md file was edited in this change set"
1199+
1200+ defp tooltip(:severity, "error"),
1201+ do: "Error — blocks the gate. mix spec.check exits non-zero."
1202+
1203+ defp tooltip(:severity, "warning"),
1204+ do: "Warning — visible in the report but does not block the gate by default."
1205+
1206+ defp tooltip(:severity, "info"),
1207+ do: "Info — advisory; never blocks."
1208+
1209+ defp tooltip(_, _), do: ""
1210+
1211+ defp title_attr(text) when is_binary(text) and text != "",
1212+ do: ~s| title="#{html_escape(text)}"|
1213+
1214+ defp title_attr(_), do: ""
1215+
1216+ defp html_escape(string) do
1217+ string
1218+ |> String.replace("&", "&amp;")
1219+ |> String.replace("<", "&lt;")
1220+ |> String.replace(">", "&gt;")
1221+ |> String.replace("\"", "&quot;")
1222+ |> String.replace("'", "&#39;")
1223+ end
1224+
1225+ defp slug(id) when is_binary(id) do
1226+ id
1227+ |> String.downcase()
1228+ |> String.replace(~r/[^a-z0-9]+/, "-")
1229+ |> String.trim("-")
1230+ end
1231+
1232+ defp slug(_), do: "x"
1233+
1234+ defp format_dt(%DateTime{} = dt), do: DateTime.to_iso8601(dt)
1235+ defp format_dt(other), do: to_string(other)
1236+
1237+ defp field(nil, _key), do: nil
1238+
1239+ defp field(item, key) when is_struct(item), do: Map.get(item, key)
1240+
1241+ defp field(item, key) when is_map(item) do
1242+ Map.get(item, key) || Map.get(item, Atom.to_string(key))
1243+ end
1244+
1245+ # ----------------------------------------------------------------------
1246+ # Embedded CSS / JS
1247+ # ----------------------------------------------------------------------
1248+
1249+ defp css do
1250+ """
1251+ :root {
1252+ --bg: #fafafa;
1253+ --fg: #1a1a1a;
1254+ --fg-muted: #6b6b6b;
1255+ --fg-faint: #9a9a9a;
1256+ --card-bg: #ffffff;
1257+ --border: #e5e5e5;
1258+ --border-strong: #cfcfcf;
1259+ --accent: #1e88e5;
1260+ --error: #c62828;
1261+ --error-bg: #ffebee;
1262+ --warning: #ad6500;
1263+ --warning-bg: #fff8e1;
1264+ --info: #1565c0;
1265+ --info-bg: #e3f2fd;
1266+ --success: #2e7d32;
1267+ --success-bg: #e8f5e9;
1268+ --neutral-bg: #f0f0f0;
1269+ --add-bg: #e6ffec;
1270+ --add-fg: #1a7f37;
1271+ --del-bg: #ffeef0;
1272+ --del-fg: #c0152e;
1273+ --hunk-bg: #ddf4ff;
1274+ --hunk-fg: #0a3069;
1275+ --code-font: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
1276+ --body-font: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif;
1277+ }
1278+
1279+ * { box-sizing: border-box; }
1280+
1281+ html, body { margin: 0; padding: 0; background: var(--bg); color: var(--fg); }
1282+ body { font-family: var(--body-font); line-height: 1.5; font-size: 15px; }
1283+
1284+ .page-header {
1285+ background: var(--card-bg);
1286+ border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
1287+ padding: 24px 32px;
1288+ }
1289+ .page-header-row {
1290+ display: flex;
1291+ align-items: baseline;
1292+ justify-content: space-between;
1293+ gap: 24px;
1294+ max-width: 1280px;
1295+ margin: 0 auto;
1296+ }
1297+ .page-header h1 {
1298+ margin: 0;
1299+ font-size: 22px;
1300+ font-weight: 600;
1301+ letter-spacing: -0.01em;
1302+ }
1303+ .page-header-meta {
1304+ color: var(--fg-muted);
1305+ font-size: 13px;
1306+ display: flex;
1307+ gap: 16px;
1308+ }
1309+ .ref { font-family: var(--code-font); font-size: 12px; }
1310+ .ref-sep { color: var(--fg-faint); margin: 0 4px; }
1311+
1312+ .layout {
1313+ max-width: 1280px;
1314+ margin: 0 auto;
1315+ padding: 24px 32px 48px;
1316+ display: grid;
1317+ grid-template-columns: 240px minmax(0, 1fr);
1318+ gap: 32px;
1319+ align-items: start;
1320+ }
1321+
1322+ main {
1323+ display: flex;
1324+ flex-direction: column;
1325+ gap: 32px;
1326+ min-width: 0;
1327+ }
1328+
1329+ .section-heading {
1330+ font-size: 14px;
1331+ font-weight: 600;
1332+ text-transform: uppercase;
1333+ letter-spacing: 0.06em;
1334+ color: var(--fg-muted);
1335+ margin: 0 0 16px 0;
1336+ }
1337+
1338+ /* TOC */
1339+ .toc {
1340+ position: sticky;
1341+ top: 16px;
1342+ max-height: calc(100vh - 32px);
1343+ overflow-y: auto;
1344+ background: var(--card-bg);
1345+ border: 1px solid var(--border);
1346+ border-radius: 8px;
1347+ padding: 16px;
1348+ font-size: 13px;
1349+ }
1350+ .toc-list, .toc-sublist { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
1351+ .toc-section { margin: 4px 0; }
1352+ .toc-section > a {
1353+ display: flex;
1354+ align-items: center;
1355+ justify-content: space-between;
1356+ gap: 6px;
1357+ color: var(--fg);
1358+ text-decoration: none;
1359+ padding: 6px 8px;
1360+ border-radius: 4px;
1361+ font-weight: 500;
1362+ }
1363+ .toc-section > a:hover { background: var(--neutral-bg); }
1364+ .toc-sublist { margin-top: 4px; padding-left: 8px; border-left: 2px solid var(--border); }
1365+ .toc-sublist li { margin: 2px 0; }
1366+ .toc-sublist a {
1367+ display: flex;
1368+ align-items: center;
1369+ justify-content: space-between;
1370+ gap: 6px;
1371+ color: var(--fg-muted);
1372+ text-decoration: none;
1373+ padding: 4px 8px;
1374+ border-radius: 4px;
1375+ font-weight: 400;
1376+ }
1377+ .toc-sublist a:hover { background: var(--neutral-bg); color: var(--fg); }
1378+ .toc-sublist code { font-size: 11px; }
1379+ .toc-pip {
1380+ display: inline-block;
1381+ min-width: 18px;
1382+ padding: 0 6px;
1383+ border-radius: 9px;
1384+ font-size: 11px;
1385+ font-weight: 600;
1386+ text-align: center;
1387+ line-height: 16px;
1388+ }
1389+ .toc-pip-clean { background: var(--success-bg); color: var(--success); }
1390+ .toc-pip-error { background: var(--error-bg); color: var(--error); }
1391+ .toc-pip-warning { background: var(--warning-bg); color: var(--warning); }
1392+ .toc-pip-info { background: var(--info-bg); color: var(--info); }
1393+
1394+ /* Triage */
1395+ .triage {
1396+ background: var(--card-bg);
1397+ border: 1px solid var(--border);
1398+ border-radius: 8px;
1399+ padding: 20px 24px;
1400+ }
1401+ .triage-clean {
1402+ background: var(--success-bg);
1403+ border-color: #c8e6c9;
1404+ color: var(--success);
1405+ display: flex;
1406+ align-items: center;
1407+ gap: 12px;
1408+ font-weight: 500;
1409+ }
1410+ .triage-icon { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; }
1411+ .triage-headline { font-size: 14px; }
1412+ .triage-header { display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
1413+ .triage-header h2 { margin: 0; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; }
1414+ .triage-counts { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
1415+
1416+ .triage-subjects {
1417+ list-style: none;
1418+ margin: 16px 0 0 0;
1419+ padding: 0;
1420+ display: flex;
1421+ flex-direction: column;
1422+ gap: 4px;
1423+ }
1424+ .triage-subject-link {
1425+ display: flex;
1426+ align-items: center;
1427+ justify-content: space-between;
1428+ gap: 12px;
1429+ padding: 6px 10px;
1430+ border-radius: 4px;
1431+ text-decoration: none;
1432+ color: var(--fg);
1433+ border: 1px solid transparent;
1434+ }
1435+ .triage-subject-link:hover {
1436+ background: var(--neutral-bg);
1437+ border-color: var(--border);
1438+ }
1439+ .badge-clean { background: var(--success-bg); color: var(--success); }
1440+
1441+ /* Change-status chips */
1442+ .chip {
1443+ display: inline-flex;
1444+ align-items: center;
1445+ padding: 1px 7px;
1446+ border-radius: 4px;
1447+ font-size: 10px;
1448+ font-weight: 700;
1449+ letter-spacing: 0.06em;
1450+ text-transform: uppercase;
1451+ border: 1px solid transparent;
1452+ line-height: 1.5;
1453+ }
1454+ .chip-new { background: #d1fae5; color: #065f46; border-color: #a7f3d0; }
1455+ .chip-modified { background: #ddd6fe; color: #5b21b6; border-color: #c4b5fd; }
1456+ .chip-removed { background: #fee2e2; color: #991b1b; border-color: #fecaca; }
1457+
1458+ /* Subject Spec-tab change callout */
1459+ .spec-change-callout {
1460+ background: var(--neutral-bg);
1461+ border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);
1462+ padding: 10px 14px;
1463+ border-radius: 4px;
1464+ font-size: 13px;
1465+ margin-bottom: 16px;
1466+ color: var(--fg);
1467+ }
1468+ .spec-change-callout strong { font-weight: 600; }
1469+ .spec-change-new-subject {
1470+ background: #ecfdf5;
1471+ border-left-color: #10b981;
1472+ color: #065f46;
1473+ }
1474+
1475+ /* Per-row tinting for new/modified */
1476+ .requirement-new,
1477+ .scenario-new {
1478+ background: #ecfdf5;
1479+ border-left: 3px solid #10b981;
1480+ padding-left: 12px;
1481+ margin-left: -12px;
1482+ border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
1483+ }
1484+ .requirement-modified,
1485+ .scenario-modified {
1486+ background: #f5f3ff;
1487+ border-left: 3px solid #8b5cf6;
1488+ padding-left: 12px;
1489+ margin-left: -12px;
1490+ border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
1491+ }
1492+
1493+ /* Removed-items section */
1494+ .tab-heading-removed { color: var(--error); }
1495+ .removed-list { list-style: none; margin: 0 0 16px 0; padding: 0; }
1496+ .removed-item {
1497+ padding: 10px 12px;
1498+ background: #fef2f2;
1499+ border-left: 3px solid #ef4444;
1500+ border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
1501+ margin-bottom: 8px;
1502+ }
1503+ .removed-header {
1504+ display: flex;
1505+ gap: 8px;
1506+ align-items: center;
1507+ flex-wrap: wrap;
1508+ margin-bottom: 4px;
1509+ }
1510+ .removed-statement { margin: 0; color: #7f1d1d; text-decoration: line-through; opacity: 0.85; }
1511+
1512+ /* ADR change-status accents */
1513+ .adr-new { border-left: 3px solid #10b981; }
1514+ .adr-modified { border-left: 3px solid #8b5cf6; }
1515+ .adr-removed { border-left: 3px solid #ef4444; }
1516+
1517+ .pill {
1518+ display: inline-block;
1519+ padding: 2px 10px;
1520+ border-radius: 999px;
1521+ font-size: 12px;
1522+ font-weight: 500;
1523+ line-height: 1.6;
1524+ background: var(--neutral-bg);
1525+ color: var(--fg-muted);
1526+ white-space: nowrap;
1527+ }
1528+ .pill-error { background: var(--error-bg); color: var(--error); }
1529+ .pill-warning { background: var(--warning-bg); color: var(--warning); }
1530+ .pill-info { background: var(--info-bg); color: var(--info); }
1531+ .pill-success { background: var(--success-bg); color: var(--success); }
1532+ .pill-neutral { background: var(--neutral-bg); color: var(--fg-muted); }
1533+ .pill-muted { background: transparent; color: var(--fg-faint); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
1534+ .pill-cover { background: #f5f0ff; color: #5b3aaa; font-family: var(--code-font); font-size: 11px; }
1535+ .pill-priority-must { background: #fee2e2; color: #b91c1c; font-weight: 600; }
1536+ .pill-priority-should { background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e; }
1537+ .pill-priority-may { background: #e0f2fe; color: #0369a1; }
1538+
1539+ .badge {
1540+ display: inline-block;
1541+ padding: 2px 8px;
1542+ border-radius: 4px;
1543+ font-size: 11px;
1544+ font-weight: 600;
1545+ text-transform: uppercase;
1546+ letter-spacing: 0.04em;
1547+ line-height: 1.6;
1548+ }
1549+ .badge-error { background: var(--error-bg); color: var(--error); }
1550+ .badge-warning { background: var(--warning-bg); color: var(--warning); }
1551+ .badge-info { background: var(--info-bg); color: var(--info); }
1552+
1553+ .findings-list { margin-top: 16px; }
1554+ .findings-list summary {
1555+ cursor: pointer;
1556+ font-size: 13px;
1557+ color: var(--fg-muted);
1558+ font-weight: 500;
1559+ padding: 8px 0;
1560+ border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
1561+ }
1562+ .findings-list ul { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
1563+ .finding-item {
1564+ display: grid;
1565+ grid-template-columns: 80px 220px 200px 1fr;
1566+ gap: 12px;
1567+ padding: 8px 0;
1568+ border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
1569+ font-size: 13px;
1570+ align-items: baseline;
1571+ }
1572+ .finding-severity { font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
1573+ .finding-error .finding-severity { color: var(--error); }
1574+ .finding-warning .finding-severity { color: var(--warning); }
1575+ .finding-info .finding-severity { color: var(--info); }
1576+ .finding-code { font-family: var(--code-font); font-size: 12px; color: var(--fg-muted); }
1577+ .finding-subject { font-family: var(--code-font); font-size: 12px; color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; }
1578+ .finding-subject:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
1579+ .finding-message { color: var(--fg); }
1580+
1581+ /* Subject card */
1582+ .subject {
1583+ background: var(--card-bg);
1584+ border: 1px solid var(--border);
1585+ border-radius: 8px;
1586+ margin-bottom: 16px;
1587+ overflow: hidden;
1588+ scroll-margin-top: 16px;
1589+ }
1590+ .subject-header {
1591+ padding: 24px 24px 16px;
1592+ border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
1593+ }
1594+ .subject-statement {
1595+ margin: 0 0 12px 0;
1596+ font-size: 17px;
1597+ line-height: 1.5;
1598+ font-weight: 500;
1599+ color: var(--fg);
1600+ letter-spacing: -0.005em;
1601+ }
1602+ .subject-meta-row {
1603+ display: flex;
1604+ align-items: center;
1605+ gap: 12px;
1606+ flex-wrap: wrap;
1607+ }
1608+ .subject-id {
1609+ font-family: var(--code-font);
1610+ font-size: 12px;
1611+ color: var(--fg-muted);
1612+ background: var(--neutral-bg);
1613+ padding: 2px 8px;
1614+ border-radius: 4px;
1615+ }
1616+ .subject-file {
1617+ font-family: var(--code-font);
1618+ font-size: 12px;
1619+ color: var(--fg-faint);
1620+ }
1621+
1622+ /* Tabs */
1623+ .tabs {
1624+ display: flex;
1625+ gap: 0;
1626+ border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
1627+ background: var(--bg);
1628+ padding: 0 12px;
1629+ }
1630+ .tab {
1631+ background: none;
1632+ border: none;
1633+ border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
1634+ padding: 12px 16px;
1635+ font-size: 13px;
1636+ font-weight: 500;
1637+ color: var(--fg-muted);
1638+ cursor: pointer;
1639+ font-family: inherit;
1640+ margin-bottom: -1px;
1641+ }
1642+ .tab:hover { color: var(--fg); }
1643+ .tab.active {
1644+ color: var(--fg);
1645+ border-bottom-color: var(--accent);
1646+ background: var(--card-bg);
1647+ }
1648+ .tab-panels { padding: 24px; }
1649+ .tab-panel { display: none; }
1650+ .tab-panel.active { display: block; }
1651+
1652+ .tab-heading {
1653+ margin: 0 0 12px 0;
1654+ font-size: 13px;
1655+ font-weight: 600;
1656+ text-transform: uppercase;
1657+ letter-spacing: 0.05em;
1658+ color: var(--fg-muted);
1659+ }
1660+ .tab-heading:not(:first-child) { margin-top: 32px; }
1661+
1662+ .empty-tab { color: var(--fg-faint); font-style: italic; margin: 0; }
1663+
1664+ /* Requirements */
1665+ .requirement-list { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
1666+ .requirement {
1667+ padding: 16px 0;
1668+ border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
1669+ }
1670+ .requirement:first-child { border-top: none; padding-top: 0; }
1671+ .requirement-header {
1672+ display: flex;
1673+ gap: 8px;
1674+ flex-wrap: wrap;
1675+ align-items: center;
1676+ margin-bottom: 6px;
1677+ }
1678+ .requirement-id {
1679+ font-family: var(--code-font);
1680+ font-size: 12px;
1681+ color: var(--fg);
1682+ background: var(--neutral-bg);
1683+ padding: 2px 8px;
1684+ border-radius: 4px;
1685+ }
1686+ .requirement-statement { margin: 0; color: var(--fg); }
1687+
1688+ /* Scenarios */
1689+ .scenario-list { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
1690+ .scenario {
1691+ padding: 16px 0;
1692+ border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
1693+ }
1694+ .scenario:first-child { border-top: none; padding-top: 0; }
1695+ .scenario-header {
1696+ display: flex;
1697+ gap: 8px;
1698+ flex-wrap: wrap;
1699+ align-items: center;
1700+ margin-bottom: 8px;
1701+ }
1702+ .scenario-id {
1703+ font-family: var(--code-font);
1704+ font-size: 12px;
1705+ color: var(--fg);
1706+ background: var(--neutral-bg);
1707+ padding: 2px 8px;
1708+ border-radius: 4px;
1709+ }
1710+ .gherkin { font-size: 14px; }
1711+ .gherkin-row {
1712+ display: grid;
1713+ grid-template-columns: 64px minmax(0, 1fr);
1714+ gap: 4px 12px;
1715+ align-items: start;
1716+ margin-bottom: 6px;
1717+ }
1718+ .gherkin-row:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
1719+ .gherkin-label {
1720+ color: var(--fg-muted);
1721+ font-weight: 600;
1722+ text-transform: uppercase;
1723+ font-size: 11px;
1724+ letter-spacing: 0.05em;
1725+ padding-top: 3px;
1726+ }
1727+ .gherkin-items {
1728+ list-style: none;
1729+ margin: 0;
1730+ padding: 0;
1731+ color: var(--fg);
1732+ }
1733+ .gherkin-items li { margin: 0; padding: 1px 0; line-height: 1.45; }
1734+ .gherkin-items li::before {
1735+ content: "•";
1736+ color: var(--fg-faint);
1737+ margin-right: 8px;
1738+ display: inline-block;
1739+ }
1740+
1741+ /* Bindings */
1742+ .bindings { margin: 0; }
1743+ .bindings dt {
1744+ font-family: var(--code-font);
1745+ font-size: 12px;
1746+ color: var(--fg-muted);
1747+ text-transform: uppercase;
1748+ letter-spacing: 0.04em;
1749+ font-weight: 600;
1750+ margin-top: 12px;
1751+ }
1752+ .bindings dt:first-child { margin-top: 0; }
1753+ .bindings dd { margin: 0; padding: 0; }
1754+ .mfa-list { list-style: none; margin: 4px 0 12px 0; padding: 0; }
1755+ .mfa-list li { font-family: var(--code-font); font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 0; }
1756+
1757+ /* Coverage tab — help disclosure */
1758+ .coverage-help {
1759+ background: var(--bg);
1760+ border: 1px solid var(--border);
1761+ border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);
1762+ border-radius: 4px;
1763+ margin-bottom: 16px;
1764+ }
1765+ .coverage-help-summary {
1766+ cursor: pointer;
1767+ list-style: none;
1768+ padding: 8px 14px;
1769+ font-size: 13px;
1770+ font-weight: 500;
1771+ color: var(--accent);
1772+ display: flex;
1773+ align-items: center;
1774+ gap: 6px;
1775+ }
1776+ .coverage-help-summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
1777+ .coverage-help-summary::after {
1778+ content: "▸";
1779+ color: var(--fg-faint);
1780+ font-size: 10px;
1781+ margin-left: auto;
1782+ }
1783+ .coverage-help[open] .coverage-help-summary::after { content: "▾"; }
1784+ .coverage-help-body {
1785+ padding: 4px 18px 14px;
1786+ font-size: 13px;
1787+ line-height: 1.55;
1788+ color: var(--fg);
1789+ }
1790+ .coverage-help-body p { margin: 8px 0; }
1791+ .coverage-help-body code { font-family: var(--code-font); font-size: 12px; background: var(--neutral-bg); padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 3px; }
1792+ .coverage-help-tiers {
1793+ margin: 8px 0;
1794+ display: grid;
1795+ grid-template-columns: 110px 1fr;
1796+ gap: 8px 14px;
1797+ align-items: start;
1798+ }
1799+ .coverage-help-tiers dt { padding-top: 2px; }
1800+ .coverage-help-tiers dd { margin: 0; }
1801+
1802+ /* Raw verification (collapsed by default) */
1803+ .raw-verification {
1804+ margin-top: 24px;
1805+ border: 1px solid var(--border);
1806+ border-radius: 4px;
1807+ background: var(--bg);
1808+ }
1809+ .raw-verification-summary {
1810+ cursor: pointer;
1811+ list-style: none;
1812+ padding: 8px 14px;
1813+ font-size: 13px;
1814+ font-weight: 600;
1815+ color: var(--fg-muted);
1816+ display: flex;
1817+ align-items: center;
1818+ gap: 6px;
1819+ }
1820+ .raw-verification-summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
1821+ .raw-verification-summary::before {
1822+ content: "▸";
1823+ color: var(--fg-faint);
1824+ font-size: 10px;
1825+ }
1826+ .raw-verification[open] .raw-verification-summary::before { content: "▾"; }
1827+ .raw-verification-explainer { padding: 0 14px; margin: 4px 0 12px; color: var(--fg-muted); font-size: 12px; font-style: italic; }
1828+ .raw-verification .verification-list { padding: 0 14px 14px; margin: 0; }
1829+
1830+ /* Help cursor on every titled chip so users discover hover content. */
1831+ [title] { cursor: help; }
1832+ a[title], button[title] { cursor: pointer; }
1833+
1834+ /* Coverage tab — per-requirement strength */
1835+ .strength-legend {
1836+ display: flex;
1837+ align-items: center;
1838+ gap: 6px;
1839+ flex-wrap: wrap;
1840+ padding: 8px 12px;
1841+ background: var(--bg);
1842+ border: 1px solid var(--border);
1843+ border-radius: 4px;
1844+ margin-bottom: 12px;
1845+ font-size: 11px;
1846+ }
1847+ .strength-legend-arrow { color: var(--fg-faint); font-weight: 600; }
1848+ .strength-legend-note { color: var(--fg-muted); margin-left: auto; font-style: italic; }
1849+ .strength-badge {
1850+ display: inline-block;
1851+ padding: 2px 8px;
1852+ border-radius: 4px;
1853+ font-size: 10px;
1854+ font-weight: 700;
1855+ text-transform: uppercase;
1856+ letter-spacing: 0.05em;
1857+ border: 1px solid transparent;
1858+ line-height: 1.5;
1859+ }
1860+ .strength-executed { background: #d1fae5; color: #065f46; border-color: #a7f3d0; }
1861+ .strength-linked { background: #fef3c7; color: #854d0e; border-color: #fde68a; }
1862+ .strength-claimed { background: #e5e7eb; color: #4b5563; border-color: #d1d5db; }
1863+ .strength-uncovered { background: #fee2e2; color: #991b1b; border-color: #fecaca; }
1864+ .strength-warn { color: var(--error); font-weight: 700; margin-left: 4px; }
1865+
1866+ .cov-req-list { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
1867+ .cov-req {
1868+ padding: 10px 12px;
1869+ border: 1px solid var(--border);
1870+ border-radius: 4px;
1871+ background: var(--card-bg);
1872+ border-left-width: 3px;
1873+ }
1874+ .cov-req-executed { border-left-color: #10b981; }
1875+ .cov-req-linked { border-left-color: #d97706; }
1876+ .cov-req-claimed { border-left-color: #9ca3af; }
1877+ .cov-req-uncovered { border-left-color: #ef4444; background: #fef2f2; }
1878+ .cov-req-header {
1879+ display: flex;
1880+ align-items: center;
1881+ gap: 8px;
1882+ flex-wrap: wrap;
1883+ margin-bottom: 4px;
1884+ }
1885+ .cov-req-statement { margin: 0 0 8px 0; color: var(--fg); font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5; }
1886+
1887+ .claim-list { list-style: none; margin: 4px 0 0 0; padding: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
1888+ .claim {
1889+ display: flex;
1890+ align-items: center;
1891+ gap: 8px;
1892+ flex-wrap: wrap;
1893+ padding: 4px 8px;
1894+ background: var(--bg);
1895+ border-radius: 3px;
1896+ font-size: 12px;
1897+ }
1898+ .claim-target { font-family: var(--code-font); font-size: 11px; color: var(--fg-muted); flex: 1; min-width: 0; overflow-wrap: anywhere; }
1899+
1900+ /* Verification */
1901+ .verification-list { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
1902+ .verification {
1903+ padding: 12px 0;
1904+ border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
1905+ }
1906+ .verification:first-child { border-top: none; padding-top: 0; }
1907+ .verification-header {
1908+ display: flex;
1909+ gap: 8px;
1910+ align-items: center;
1911+ flex-wrap: wrap;
1912+ margin-bottom: 6px;
1913+ }
1914+ .verification-target { font-family: var(--code-font); font-size: 12px; }
1915+ .verification-covers { display: flex; gap: 4px; flex-wrap: wrap; padding-left: 4px; }
1916+
1917+ /* Decisions */
1918+ .decision-ref-list { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
1919+ .decision-ref-list li { padding: 4px 0; font-family: var(--code-font); font-size: 13px; }
1920+
1921+ .adr-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
1922+ .adr {
1923+ border: 1px solid var(--border);
1924+ border-radius: 6px;
1925+ background: var(--bg);
1926+ }
1927+ .adr[open] { background: var(--card-bg); }
1928+ .adr-summary {
1929+ display: flex;
1930+ align-items: center;
1931+ gap: 8px;
1932+ flex-wrap: wrap;
1933+ padding: 10px 14px;
1934+ cursor: pointer;
1935+ list-style: none;
1936+ font-size: 13px;
1937+ }
1938+ .adr-summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
1939+ .adr-summary::before {
1940+ content: "▸";
1941+ color: var(--fg-faint);
1942+ font-size: 10px;
1943+ width: 10px;
1944+ transition: transform 0.1s ease;
1945+ }
1946+ .adr[open] .adr-summary::before { transform: rotate(90deg); }
1947+ .adr-id { font-family: var(--code-font); font-size: 12px; color: var(--fg); background: var(--neutral-bg); padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; }
1948+ .adr-title { color: var(--fg); flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
1949+ .adr-title-missing { color: var(--fg-faint); font-style: italic; flex: 1; }
1950+ .adr-date { color: var(--fg-muted); font-size: 12px; font-family: var(--code-font); }
1951+ .adr-body-wrap { padding: 0 14px 14px; }
1952+ .adr-source { padding-top: 6px; font-size: 11px; color: var(--fg-faint); text-align: right; }
1953+
1954+ /* GitHub-style markdown rendering for ADR bodies. */
1955+ .markdown-body {
1956+ background: var(--bg);
1957+ border: 1px solid var(--border);
1958+ border-radius: 4px;
1959+ padding: 16px 20px;
1960+ font-family: var(--body-font);
1961+ font-size: 14px;
1962+ line-height: 1.6;
1963+ color: var(--fg);
1964+ max-height: 560px;
1965+ overflow-y: auto;
1966+ word-wrap: break-word;
1967+ }
1968+ .markdown-body > *:first-child { margin-top: 0; }
1969+ .markdown-body > *:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
1970+ .markdown-body h1, .markdown-body h2, .markdown-body h3, .markdown-body h4, .markdown-body h5, .markdown-body h6 {
1971+ margin: 24px 0 12px;
1972+ font-weight: 600;
1973+ line-height: 1.25;
1974+ color: var(--fg);
1975+ }
1976+ .markdown-body h1 { font-size: 22px; padding-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
1977+ .markdown-body h2 { font-size: 18px; padding-bottom: 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
1978+ .markdown-body h3 { font-size: 16px; }
1979+ .markdown-body h4 { font-size: 14px; }
1980+ .markdown-body h5 { font-size: 13px; color: var(--fg-muted); }
1981+ .markdown-body h6 { font-size: 12px; color: var(--fg-muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
1982+ .markdown-body p { margin: 0 0 12px; }
1983+ .markdown-body a { color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; }
1984+ .markdown-body a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
1985+ .markdown-body strong { font-weight: 600; }
1986+ .markdown-body em { font-style: italic; }
1987+ .markdown-body code {
1988+ font-family: var(--code-font);
1989+ font-size: 0.9em;
1990+ background: var(--neutral-bg);
1991+ border-radius: 3px;
1992+ padding: 1px 5px;
1993+ color: var(--fg);
1994+ }
1995+ .markdown-body pre {
1996+ background: var(--card-bg);
1997+ border: 1px solid var(--border);
1998+ border-radius: 4px;
1999+ padding: 12px 14px;
2000+ overflow-x: auto;
2001+ font-size: 12px;
2002+ line-height: 1.45;
2003+ margin: 0 0 12px;
2004+ }
2005+ .markdown-body pre > code {
2006+ background: transparent;
2007+ padding: 0;
2008+ border-radius: 0;
2009+ font-size: inherit;
2010+ }
2011+ .markdown-body ul, .markdown-body ol {
2012+ margin: 0 0 12px;
2013+ padding-left: 24px;
2014+ }
2015+ .markdown-body li { margin: 4px 0; }
2016+ .markdown-body li > p { margin: 4px 0; }
2017+ .markdown-body blockquote {
2018+ margin: 0 0 12px;
2019+ padding: 4px 12px;
2020+ color: var(--fg-muted);
2021+ border-left: 3px solid var(--border-strong);
2022+ background: var(--bg);
2023+ }
2024+ .markdown-body blockquote > :first-child { margin-top: 0; }
2025+ .markdown-body blockquote > :last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
2026+ .markdown-body hr {
2027+ border: none;
2028+ border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
2029+ margin: 16px 0;
2030+ }
2031+ .markdown-body table {
2032+ border-collapse: collapse;
2033+ margin: 0 0 12px;
2034+ font-size: 13px;
2035+ display: block;
2036+ overflow-x: auto;
2037+ }
2038+ .markdown-body table th, .markdown-body table td {
2039+ border: 1px solid var(--border);
2040+ padding: 6px 12px;
2041+ text-align: left;
2042+ }
2043+ .markdown-body table th { background: var(--neutral-bg); font-weight: 600; }
2044+ .markdown-body table tr:nth-child(2n) td { background: var(--bg); }
2045+ .markdown-body img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; }
2046+
2047+ .decisions-changed {
2048+ background: var(--card-bg);
2049+ border: 1px solid var(--border);
2050+ border-radius: 8px;
2051+ padding: 24px;
2052+ }
2053+ .decision-changed-list { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
2054+ .decision-changed-list li {
2055+ padding: 8px 0;
2056+ display: flex;
2057+ gap: 8px;
2058+ align-items: center;
2059+ flex-wrap: wrap;
2060+ border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
2061+ font-size: 13px;
2062+ }
2063+ .decision-changed-list li:first-child { border-top: none; }
2064+ .affects { color: var(--fg-muted); font-size: 12px; }
2065+
2066+ /* Misc panel */
2067+ .misc {
2068+ background: var(--card-bg);
2069+ border: 1px solid var(--border);
2070+ border-radius: 8px;
2071+ padding: 24px;
2072+ }
2073+ .misc-explainer { color: var(--fg-muted); margin: 0 0 16px 0; font-size: 13px; }
2074+ .misc-change, .code-change {
2075+ margin-bottom: 12px;
2076+ border: 1px solid var(--border);
2077+ border-radius: 4px;
2078+ background: var(--card-bg);
2079+ scroll-margin-top: 16px;
2080+ }
2081+ .misc-change:last-child, .code-change:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
2082+ .filename {
2083+ background: var(--neutral-bg);
2084+ padding: 8px 12px;
2085+ font-size: 12px;
2086+ cursor: pointer;
2087+ list-style: none;
2088+ display: flex;
2089+ align-items: center;
2090+ gap: 8px;
2091+ border-radius: 4px;
2092+ }
2093+ .misc-change[open] > .filename, .code-change[open] > .filename {
2094+ border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;
2095+ border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
2096+ }
2097+ .filename::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
2098+ .filename::before {
2099+ content: "▾";
2100+ color: var(--fg-faint);
2101+ font-size: 10px;
2102+ width: 10px;
2103+ }
2104+ .misc-change:not([open]) > .filename::before,
2105+ .code-change:not([open]) > .filename::before { content: "▸"; }
2106+ .filename code { font-family: var(--code-font); }
2107+ .misc-change > .diff, .code-change > .diff {
2108+ border: none;
2109+ border-radius: 0 0 4px 4px;
2110+ }
2111+
2112+ /* Files section: slide-out file-tree drawer next to file diffs.
2113+ The drawer/handle live in an absolutely-positioned rail so they
2114+ never claim vertical layout space — file diffs always start at
2115+ the top of the section. Sticky positioning inside the rail makes
2116+ both the panel and the handle follow the user's scroll. */
2117+ .files-section {
2118+ position: relative;
2119+ padding-left: 256px;
2120+ transition: padding-left 0.25s ease;
2121+ /* Ensure the absolutely-positioned drawer rail (height:100% of this
2122+ section) always has room to render even when every file diff is
2123+ collapsed and the right column is tiny. Without this the parent
2124+ subject card's overflow:hidden clips the drawer. */
2125+ min-height: 320px;
2126+ }
2127+ .files-section.tree-collapsed { padding-left: 32px; }
2128+
2129+ .file-tree-rail {
2130+ position: absolute;
2131+ top: 0;
2132+ left: 0;
2133+ width: 240px;
2134+ height: 100%;
2135+ pointer-events: none;
2136+ }
2137+
2138+ .file-tree-panel,
2139+ .file-tree-handle {
2140+ pointer-events: auto;
2141+ position: sticky;
2142+ top: 16px;
2143+ }
2144+
2145+ .file-tree-panel {
2146+ width: 240px;
2147+ max-height: calc(100vh - 32px);
2148+ background: var(--bg);
2149+ border: 1px solid var(--border);
2150+ border-radius: 6px;
2151+ display: flex;
2152+ flex-direction: column;
2153+ overflow: hidden;
2154+ transform: translateX(0);
2155+ opacity: 1;
2156+ transition: transform 0.25s ease, opacity 0.2s ease;
2157+ z-index: 1;
2158+ }
2159+ .files-section.tree-collapsed .file-tree-panel {
2160+ transform: translateX(calc(-100% - 16px));
2161+ opacity: 0;
2162+ pointer-events: none;
2163+ }
2164+
2165+ .file-tree-header {
2166+ display: flex;
2167+ align-items: center;
2168+ justify-content: space-between;
2169+ padding: 8px 12px;
2170+ border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
2171+ background: var(--card-bg);
2172+ }
2173+ .file-tree-title {
2174+ font-size: 11px;
2175+ font-weight: 600;
2176+ text-transform: uppercase;
2177+ letter-spacing: 0.05em;
2178+ color: var(--fg-muted);
2179+ }
2180+ .file-tree-close {
2181+ background: none;
2182+ border: none;
2183+ cursor: pointer;
2184+ font-size: 18px;
2185+ line-height: 1;
2186+ color: var(--fg-faint);
2187+ padding: 0 4px;
2188+ font-family: inherit;
2189+ }
2190+ .file-tree-close:hover { color: var(--fg); }
2191+ .file-tree-scroll {
2192+ flex: 1;
2193+ overflow-y: auto;
2194+ padding: 8px 0;
2195+ }
2196+
2197+ .file-tree-handle {
2198+ width: 24px;
2199+ height: 64px;
2200+ background: var(--card-bg);
2201+ border: 1px solid var(--border);
2202+ border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
2203+ border-left: none;
2204+ cursor: pointer;
2205+ display: none;
2206+ align-items: center;
2207+ justify-content: center;
2208+ color: var(--fg-muted);
2209+ font-size: 13px;
2210+ font-family: inherit;
2211+ padding: 0;
2212+ z-index: 2;
2213+ }
2214+ .file-tree-handle:hover { background: var(--neutral-bg); color: var(--fg); }
2215+ .files-section.tree-collapsed .file-tree-handle { display: flex; }
2216+ .files-section.tree-collapsed .file-tree-panel { display: none; }
2217+ .file-tree-handle-icon { display: inline-block; }
2218+
2219+ .files-list { min-width: 0; }
2220+
2221+ .tree { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0 12px; font-family: var(--code-font); font-size: 12px; }
2222+ .tree .tree { padding: 0 0 0 14px; margin-top: 2px; border-left: 1px dotted var(--border-strong); margin-left: 6px; }
2223+ .tree-folder { padding: 1px 0; color: var(--fg); }
2224+ .tree-folder > details > summary {
2225+ cursor: pointer;
2226+ list-style: none;
2227+ display: flex;
2228+ align-items: center;
2229+ gap: 4px;
2230+ padding: 2px 4px;
2231+ border-radius: 3px;
2232+ }
2233+ .tree-folder > details > summary:hover { background: var(--neutral-bg); }
2234+ .tree-folder > details > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
2235+ .tree-folder > details > summary::before {
2236+ content: "▾";
2237+ color: var(--fg-faint);
2238+ font-size: 9px;
2239+ width: 10px;
2240+ display: inline-block;
2241+ }
2242+ .tree-folder > details:not([open]) > summary::before { content: "▸"; }
2243+ .tree-leaf { padding: 1px 0; }
2244+ .tree-leaf a {
2245+ display: flex;
2246+ align-items: center;
2247+ gap: 4px;
2248+ color: var(--accent);
2249+ text-decoration: none;
2250+ padding: 2px 4px;
2251+ padding-left: 14px;
2252+ border-radius: 3px;
2253+ }
2254+ .tree-leaf a:hover { background: var(--neutral-bg); text-decoration: underline; }
2255+
2256+ @media (max-width: 760px) {
2257+ .files-section, .files-section.tree-collapsed { padding-left: 0; }
2258+ .file-tree-rail { position: static; width: auto; height: auto; pointer-events: auto; }
2259+ .file-tree-panel {
2260+ position: static;
2261+ width: 100%;
2262+ max-height: 240px;
2263+ transform: none !important;
2264+ opacity: 1 !important;
2265+ pointer-events: auto !important;
2266+ margin-bottom: 12px;
2267+ display: flex !important;
2268+ }
2269+ .file-tree-handle { display: none !important; }
2270+ }
2271+
2272+ /* Diff */
2273+ .diff {
2274+ background: var(--card-bg);
2275+ border-radius: 0 0 4px 4px;
2276+ overflow-x: auto;
2277+ font-family: var(--code-font);
2278+ font-size: 12px;
2279+ line-height: 1.5;
2280+ }
2281+ .diff-row {
2282+ display: grid;
2283+ grid-template-columns: 44px 44px 18px minmax(0, 1fr);
2284+ align-items: stretch;
2285+ }
2286+ .diff-lineno {
2287+ text-align: right;
2288+ padding: 0 6px 0 4px;
2289+ color: var(--fg-faint);
2290+ font-size: 11px;
2291+ user-select: none;
2292+ background: var(--bg);
2293+ white-space: pre;
2294+ }
2295+ .diff-marker {
2296+ user-select: none;
2297+ text-align: center;
2298+ padding: 0 2px;
2299+ color: var(--fg-faint);
2300+ font-weight: 500;
2301+ }
2302+ .diff-content {
2303+ padding: 0 8px;
2304+ white-space: pre;
2305+ color: var(--fg);
2306+ overflow-wrap: normal;
2307+ }
2308+ .diff-row-ctx { background: var(--card-bg); }
2309+ .diff-row-add { background: var(--add-bg); }
2310+ .diff-row-add .diff-lineno-new { background: #ccffd8; color: #1a7f37; }
2311+ .diff-row-add .diff-marker { color: #1a7f37; }
2312+ .diff-row-add .diff-content { color: #14532d; }
2313+ .diff-row-del { background: var(--del-bg); }
2314+ .diff-row-del .diff-lineno-old { background: #ffd1ce; color: #82071e; }
2315+ .diff-row-del .diff-marker { color: #82071e; }
2316+ .diff-row-del .diff-content { color: #6e0a17; }
2317+ .diff-row-hunk { background: var(--hunk-bg); color: var(--hunk-fg); }
2318+ .diff-row-hunk .diff-lineno { background: var(--hunk-bg); color: var(--hunk-fg); }
2319+ .diff-row-hunk .diff-content { padding: 4px 8px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--hunk-fg); }
2320+
2321+ /* Prism integration: keep our diff-row backgrounds + line styling
2322+ intact while letting Prism color the tokens inside .diff-content. */
2323+ code.diff-content {
2324+ display: inline;
2325+ background: transparent !important;
2326+ padding: 0 8px;
2327+ margin: 0;
2328+ border-radius: 0;
2329+ font-family: var(--code-font);
2330+ font-size: inherit;
2331+ color: inherit;
2332+ white-space: pre;
2333+ text-shadow: none;
2334+ }
2335+ code.diff-content[class*="language-"] { tab-size: 2; }
2336+ pre[class*="language-"], code[class*="language-"] {
2337+ text-shadow: none;
2338+ background: transparent;
2339+ box-shadow: none;
2340+ }
2341+ /* Tone Prism's token colors a touch so they read well on the soft
2342+ add/del backgrounds. */
2343+ .diff-row-add code .token.deleted,
2344+ .diff-row-del code .token.inserted { background: transparent; }
2345+
2346+ /* Footer */
2347+ .page-footer {
2348+ max-width: 1280px;
2349+ margin: 0 auto;
2350+ padding: 16px 32px 32px;
2351+ color: var(--fg-faint);
2352+ font-size: 12px;
2353+ text-align: right;
2354+ }
2355+
2356+ /* Anchor scroll offsets so sticky headers don't cover the target */
2357+ #triage, #subjects, #decisions-changed, #misc, .subject { scroll-margin-top: 16px; }
2358+
2359+ @media (max-width: 960px) {
2360+ .layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
2361+ .toc { position: static; max-height: none; }
2362+ }
2363+
2364+ @media (max-width: 720px) {
2365+ .page-header, .layout, .page-footer { padding-left: 16px; padding-right: 16px; }
2366+ .finding-item { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 4px; }
2367+ }
2368+ """
2369+ end
2370+
2371+ defp js do
2372+ """
2373+ // Tab switching inside subject cards.
2374+ document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
2375+ var btn = e.target.closest('.tab');
2376+ if (!btn) return;
2377+ var subjectCard = btn.closest('.subject');
2378+ if (!subjectCard) return;
2379+ var targetId = btn.getAttribute('data-tab');
2380+ subjectCard.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(function (t) { t.classList.remove('active'); });
2381+ subjectCard.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel').forEach(function (p) { p.classList.remove('active'); });
2382+ btn.classList.add('active');
2383+ var panel = subjectCard.querySelector('#' + CSS.escape(targetId));
2384+ if (panel) panel.classList.add('active');
2385+ });
2386+
2387+ // File-tree drawer: open / close / close-on-leaf-click.
2388+ function closeAllTrees() {
2389+ document.querySelectorAll('.files-section:not(.tree-collapsed)').forEach(function (s) {
2390+ s.classList.add('tree-collapsed');
2391+ });
2392+ }
2393+
2394+ document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
2395+ var openHandle = e.target.closest('[data-tree-action=\\"open\\"]');
2396+ if (openHandle) {
2397+ var section = openHandle.closest('.files-section');
2398+ if (section) section.classList.remove('tree-collapsed');
2399+ return;
2400+ }
2401+ var closeBtn = e.target.closest('[data-tree-action=\\"close\\"]');
2402+ if (closeBtn) {
2403+ var section = closeBtn.closest('.files-section');
2404+ if (section) section.classList.add('tree-collapsed');
2405+ return;
2406+ }
2407+ var leaf = e.target.closest('[data-tree-leaf]');
2408+ if (leaf) {
2409+ var section = leaf.closest('.files-section');
2410+ if (section) section.classList.add('tree-collapsed');
2411+ // Let the anchor navigation proceed.
2412+ }
2413+ });
2414+
2415+ // Close drawers on user-initiated scroll. Wait briefly after load so the
2416+ // browser's own scroll-to-hash on initial load doesn't immediately close
2417+ // every drawer.
2418+ setTimeout(function () {
2419+ var lastY = window.scrollY;
2420+ window.addEventListener('scroll', function () {
2421+ var dy = Math.abs(window.scrollY - lastY);
2422+ lastY = window.scrollY;
2423+ if (dy > 4) closeAllTrees();
2424+ }, { passive: true });
2425+ }, 600);
2426+
2427+ // Trigger Prism syntax highlighting once the DOM is ready. Each
2428+ // .diff-content with a `language-X` class gets tokenized and replaced
2429+ // with span-wrapped tokens. We avoid Prism's auto-loader by pre-loading
2430+ // the languages we ship.
2431+ if (typeof Prism !== 'undefined' && Prism.highlightAll) {
2432+ if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
2433+ document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () { Prism.highlightAll(); });
2434+ } else {
2435+ Prism.highlightAll();
2436+ }
2437+ }
2438+ """
2439+ end
2440+end
lib/specled_ex/review/spec_diff.ex
@@ -0,0 +1,173 @@
1+defmodule SpecLedEx.Review.SpecDiff do
2+ @moduledoc false
3+
4+ alias SpecLedEx.Parser
5+
6+ @doc """
7+ Computes per-id change sets for one subject's requirements and scenarios
8+ between `base_ref` and the working tree.
9+
10+ Returns:
11+
12+ %{
13+ file_changed?: boolean,
14+ base_existed?: boolean,
15+ requirements: %{
16+ added: [item],
17+ modified: [%{id, head, base}],
18+ removed: [item],
19+ unchanged_ids: MapSet.t
20+ },
21+ scenarios: %{... same shape ...}
22+ }
23+
24+ When the spec file did not exist at `base_ref`, every current requirement
25+ and scenario is reported as added.
26+ """
27+ def compute(root, base_ref, head_subject) do
28+ file = head_subject["file"]
29+ base_subject = parse_at_base(root, base_ref, file)
30+ base_existed? = not is_nil(base_subject)
31+
32+ head_reqs = list_field(head_subject, "requirements")
33+ base_reqs = list_field(base_subject || %{}, "requirements")
34+ head_scenarios = list_field(head_subject, "scenarios")
35+ base_scenarios = list_field(base_subject || %{}, "scenarios")
36+
37+ %{
38+ file_changed?: file_changed?(root, base_ref, file),
39+ base_existed?: base_existed?,
40+ requirements: changeset(head_reqs, base_reqs, [:statement, :priority, :stability]),
41+ scenarios: changeset(head_scenarios, base_scenarios, [:given, :when, :then, :covers])
42+ }
43+ end
44+
45+ @doc """
46+ Returns `:new`, `:modified`, `:unchanged`, or `:removed` for an ADR file
47+ by comparing its content at `base_ref` vs. the working tree.
48+ """
49+ def adr_change_status(root, base_ref, file) do
50+ base = fetch_at_ref(root, base_ref, file)
51+ head_path = Path.join(root, file)
52+ head_exists? = File.exists?(head_path)
53+
54+ case {base, head_exists?} do
55+ {:error, true} -> :new
56+ {:error, false} -> :unchanged
57+ {{:ok, _}, false} -> :removed
58+ {{:ok, base_content}, true} ->
59+ case File.read(head_path) do
60+ {:ok, head_content} when head_content == base_content -> :unchanged
61+ _ -> :modified
62+ end
63+ end
64+ end
65+
66+ defp parse_at_base(root, base_ref, file) when is_binary(file) do
67+ case fetch_at_ref(root, base_ref, file) do
68+ {:ok, content} ->
69+ tmp =
70+ Path.join(
71+ System.tmp_dir!(),
72+ "specled_diff_#{System.unique_integer([:positive])}.spec.md"
73+ )
74+
75+ File.write!(tmp, content)
76+
77+ try do
78+ Parser.parse_file(tmp, Path.dirname(tmp))
79+ after
80+ File.rm(tmp)
81+ end
82+
83+ :error ->
84+ nil
85+ end
86+ end
87+
88+ defp parse_at_base(_root, _base_ref, _file), do: nil
89+
90+ defp file_changed?(_root, _base_ref, nil), do: false
91+
92+ defp file_changed?(root, base_ref, file) do
93+ case fetch_at_ref(root, base_ref, file) do
94+ {:ok, base_content} ->
95+ case File.read(Path.join(root, file)) do
96+ {:ok, head_content} -> base_content != head_content
97+ _ -> true
98+ end
99+
100+ :error ->
101+ true
102+ end
103+ end
104+
105+ defp fetch_at_ref(root, ref, file) when is_binary(ref) and is_binary(file) do
106+ {output, status} =
107+ System.cmd("git", ["-C", root, "show", "#{ref}:#{file}"], stderr_to_stdout: true)
108+
109+ if status == 0, do: {:ok, output}, else: :error
110+ end
111+
112+ defp fetch_at_ref(_, _, _), do: :error
113+
114+ defp changeset(head_items, base_items, compare_keys) do
115+ head_by_id = index_by_id(head_items)
116+ base_by_id = index_by_id(base_items)
117+
118+ head_ids = head_by_id |> Map.keys() |> MapSet.new()
119+ base_ids = base_by_id |> Map.keys() |> MapSet.new()
120+
121+ added_ids = MapSet.difference(head_ids, base_ids)
122+ removed_ids = MapSet.difference(base_ids, head_ids)
123+ common_ids = MapSet.intersection(head_ids, base_ids)
124+
125+ {modified_ids, unchanged_ids} =
126+ Enum.split_with(common_ids, fn id ->
127+ items_differ?(head_by_id[id], base_by_id[id], compare_keys)
128+ end)
129+
130+ %{
131+ added: Enum.map(added_ids, &head_by_id[&1]),
132+ removed: Enum.map(removed_ids, &base_by_id[&1]),
133+ modified:
134+ Enum.map(modified_ids, fn id ->
135+ %{id: id, head: head_by_id[id], base: base_by_id[id]}
136+ end),
137+ unchanged_ids: MapSet.new(unchanged_ids)
138+ }
139+ end
140+
141+ defp index_by_id(items) do
142+ items
143+ |> Enum.map(fn item -> {get_id(item), item} end)
144+ |> Enum.reject(fn {id, _} -> id == "" end)
145+ |> Map.new()
146+ end
147+
148+ defp get_id(item) when is_struct(item), do: to_string(Map.get(item, :id) || "")
149+
150+ defp get_id(item) when is_map(item),
151+ do: to_string(Map.get(item, :id) || Map.get(item, "id") || "")
152+
153+ defp get_id(_), do: ""
154+
155+ defp items_differ?(a, b, keys) do
156+ Enum.any?(keys, fn key -> get_field(a, key) != get_field(b, key) end)
157+ end
158+
159+ defp get_field(item, key) when is_struct(item), do: Map.get(item, key)
160+
161+ defp get_field(item, key) when is_map(item) do
162+ Map.get(item, key) || Map.get(item, Atom.to_string(key))
163+ end
164+
165+ defp get_field(_, _), do: nil
166+
167+ defp list_field(map, key) when is_map(map) do
168+ case Map.get(map, key) do
169+ list when is_list(list) -> list
170+ _ -> []
171+ end
172+ end
173+end
priv/spec_init/workflows/spec_review.yml.eex
@@ -0,0 +1,130 @@
1+# covers: specled.spec_review.gh_pages_distribution
2+#
3+# Renders mix spec.review on every pull request, deploys the resulting
4+# HTML to a per-PR path on the `gh-pages` branch, and posts/updates a PR
5+# comment linking to it.
6+#
7+# To use:
8+# 1. Copy this file to .github/workflows/spec-review.yml in your repo.
9+# 2. Enable GitHub Pages for the repo, source = "Deploy from a branch",
10+# branch = `gh-pages`, folder = `/ (root)`.
11+# 3. Ensure the workflow has `contents: write` and `pull-requests: write`
12+# permissions (set below).
13+#
14+# The artifact lands at:
15+# https://<owner>.github.io/<repo>/pr/<PR>/
16+#
17+# Stale per-PR paths are NOT auto-cleaned in this version. Add a separate
18+# cleanup job if your repo has many PRs.
19+
20+name: Spec Review
21+
22+on:
23+ pull_request:
24+ types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]
25+
26+permissions:
27+ contents: write
28+ pull-requests: write
29+
30+concurrency:
31+ group: spec-review-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
32+ cancel-in-progress: true
33+
34+jobs:
35+ render:
36+ runs-on: ubuntu-latest
37+ steps:
38+ - name: Checkout PR head with full history
39+ uses: actions/checkout@v4
40+ with:
41+ fetch-depth: 0
42+
43+ - name: Set up Elixir
44+ uses: erlef/setup-beam@v1
45+ with:
46+ version-file: .tool-versions
47+ version-type: strict
48+
49+ - name: Cache deps and build
50+ uses: actions/cache@v4
51+ with:
52+ path: |
53+ deps
54+ _build
55+ key: spec-review-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('mix.lock') }}
56+ restore-keys: |
57+ spec-review-${{ runner.os }}-
58+
59+ - name: Install dependencies
60+ run: mix deps.get
61+
62+ - name: Render spec.review
63+ run: |
64+ mix spec.review \
65+ --base origin/${{ github.base_ref }} \
66+ --output spec_review.html
67+
68+ - name: Deploy to gh-pages under /pr/${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}/
69+ env:
70+ PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
71+ run: |
72+ set -euo pipefail
73+ PR_DIR="pr/${PR_NUMBER}"
74+
75+ git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
76+ git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
77+
78+ # Work in a sibling worktree so we don't disturb the PR checkout.
79+ DEPLOY_DIR="$(mktemp -d)"
80+ if git ls-remote --exit-code origin gh-pages >/dev/null 2>&1; then
81+ git fetch origin gh-pages:gh-pages
82+ git worktree add "$DEPLOY_DIR" gh-pages
83+ else
84+ git worktree add --orphan -b gh-pages "$DEPLOY_DIR"
85+ (cd "$DEPLOY_DIR" && rm -rf ./* ./.* 2>/dev/null || true)
86+ (cd "$DEPLOY_DIR" && touch .nojekyll)
87+ fi
88+
89+ mkdir -p "$DEPLOY_DIR/$PR_DIR"
90+ cp spec_review.html "$DEPLOY_DIR/$PR_DIR/index.html"
91+
92+ (
93+ cd "$DEPLOY_DIR"
94+ git add "$PR_DIR/index.html" .nojekyll 2>/dev/null || git add "$PR_DIR/index.html"
95+ if git diff --cached --quiet; then
96+ echo "No changes to deploy."
97+ else
98+ git commit -m "spec.review for PR #${PR_NUMBER} (${{ github.sha }})"
99+ git push origin gh-pages
100+ fi
101+ )
102+
103+ git worktree remove --force "$DEPLOY_DIR"
104+
105+ - name: Post or update PR comment
106+ env:
107+ GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
108+ PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
109+ REPO: ${{ github.repository }}
110+ run: |
111+ set -euo pipefail
112+ OWNER="${REPO%/*}"
113+ REPO_NAME="${REPO#*/}"
114+ URL="https://${OWNER}.github.io/${REPO_NAME}/pr/${PR_NUMBER}/"
115+ MARKER="<!-- spec-review-comment -->"
116+ BODY=$(printf '%s\n\n📄 **Spec review** for this PR: %s\n\n_Rendered by `mix spec.review` from %s._\n' \
117+ "$MARKER" "$URL" "${{ github.sha }}")
118+
119+ EXISTING=$(gh api "repos/${REPO}/issues/${PR_NUMBER}/comments" \
120+ --jq ".[] | select(.body | startswith(\"$MARKER\")) | .id" \
121+ | head -n 1)
122+
123+ if [ -n "$EXISTING" ]; then
124+ gh api --method PATCH "repos/${REPO}/issues/comments/${EXISTING}" \
125+ -f body="$BODY" >/dev/null
126+ echo "Updated comment $EXISTING"
127+ else
128+ gh pr comment "$PR_NUMBER" --body "$BODY"
129+ echo "Posted new comment"
130+ fi
priv/spec_review_assets/prism-bash.min.js
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
1+!function(e){var t="\\b(?:BASH|BASHOPTS|BASH_ALIASES|BASH_ARGC|BASH_ARGV|BASH_CMDS|BASH_COMPLETION_COMPAT_DIR|BASH_LINENO|BASH_REMATCH|BASH_SOURCE|BASH_VERSINFO|BASH_VERSION|COLORTERM|COLUMNS|COMP_WORDBREAKS|DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS|DEFAULTS_PATH|DESKTOP_SESSION|DIRSTACK|DISPLAY|EUID|GDMSESSION|GDM_LANG|GNOME_KEYRING_CONTROL|GNOME_KEYRING_PID|GPG_AGENT_INFO|GROUPS|HISTCONTROL|HISTFILE|HISTFILESIZE|HISTSIZE|HOME|HOSTNAME|HOSTTYPE|IFS|INSTANCE|JOB|LANG|LANGUAGE|LC_ADDRESS|LC_ALL|LC_IDENTIFICATION|LC_MEASUREMENT|LC_MONETARY|LC_NAME|LC_NUMERIC|LC_PAPER|LC_TELEPHONE|LC_TIME|LESSCLOSE|LESSOPEN|LINES|LOGNAME|LS_COLORS|MACHTYPE|MAILCHECK|MANDATORY_PATH|NO_AT_BRIDGE|OLDPWD|OPTERR|OPTIND|ORBIT_SOCKETDIR|OSTYPE|PAPERSIZE|PATH|PIPESTATUS|PPID|PS1|PS2|PS3|PS4|PWD|RANDOM|REPLY|SECONDS|SELINUX_INIT|SESSION|SESSIONTYPE|SESSION_MANAGER|SHELL|SHELLOPTS|SHLVL|SSH_AUTH_SOCK|TERM|UID|UPSTART_EVENTS|UPSTART_INSTANCE|UPSTART_JOB|UPSTART_SESSION|USER|WINDOWID|XAUTHORITY|XDG_CONFIG_DIRS|XDG_CURRENT_DESKTOP|XDG_DATA_DIRS|XDG_GREETER_DATA_DIR|XDG_MENU_PREFIX|XDG_RUNTIME_DIR|XDG_SEAT|XDG_SEAT_PATH|XDG_SESSION_DESKTOP|XDG_SESSION_ID|XDG_SESSION_PATH|XDG_SESSION_TYPE|XDG_VTNR|XMODIFIERS)\\b",a={pattern:/(^(["']?)\w+\2)[ \t]+\S.*/,lookbehind:!0,alias:"punctuation",inside:null},n={bash:a,environment:{pattern:RegExp("\\$"+t),alias:"constant"},variable:[{pattern:/\$?\(\([\s\S]+?\)\)/,greedy:!0,inside:{variable:[{pattern:/(^\$\(\([\s\S]+)\)\)/,lookbehind:!0},/^\$\(\(/],number:/\b0x[\dA-Fa-f]+\b|(?:\b\d+(?:\.\d*)?|\B\.\d+)(?:[Ee]-?\d+)?/,operator:/--|\+\+|\*\*=?|<<=?|>>=?|&&|\|\||[=!+\-*/%<>^&|]=?|[?~:]/,punctuation:/\(\(?|\)\)?|,|;/}},{pattern:/\$\((?:\([^)]+\)|[^()])+\)|`[^`]+`/,greedy:!0,inside:{variable:/^\$\(|^`|\)$|`$/}},{pattern:/\$\{[^}]+\}/,greedy:!0,inside:{operator:/:[-=?+]?|[!\/]|##?|%%?|\^\^?|,,?/,punctuation:/[\[\]]/,environment:{pattern:RegExp("(\\{)"+t),lookbehind:!0,alias:"constant"}}},/\$(?:\w+|[#?*!@$])/],entity:/\\(?:[abceEfnrtv\\"]|O?[0-7]{1,3}|U[0-9a-fA-F]{8}|u[0-9a-fA-F]{4}|x[0-9a-fA-F]{1,2})/};e.languages.bash={shebang:{pattern:/^#!\s*\/.*/,alias:"important"},comment:{pattern:/(^|[^"{\\$])#.*/,lookbehind:!0},"function-name":[{pattern:/(\bfunction\s+)[\w-]+(?=(?:\s*\(?:\s*\))?\s*\{)/,lookbehind:!0,alias:"function"},{pattern:/\b[\w-]+(?=\s*\(\s*\)\s*\{)/,alias:"function"}],"for-or-select":{pattern:/(\b(?:for|select)\s+)\w+(?=\s+in\s)/,alias:"variable",lookbehind:!0},"assign-left":{pattern:/(^|[\s;|&]|[<>]\()\w+(?:\.\w+)*(?=\+?=)/,inside:{environment:{pattern:RegExp("(^|[\\s;|&]|[<>]\\()"+t),lookbehind:!0,alias:"constant"}},alias:"variable",lookbehind:!0},parameter:{pattern:/(^|\s)-{1,2}(?:\w+:[+-]?)?\w+(?:\.\w+)*(?=[=\s]|$)/,alias:"variable",lookbehind:!0},string:[{pattern:/((?:^|[^<])<<-?\s*)(\w+)\s[\s\S]*?(?:\r?\n|\r)\2/,lookbehind:!0,greedy:!0,inside:n},{pattern:/((?:^|[^<])<<-?\s*)(["'])(\w+)\2\s[\s\S]*?(?:\r?\n|\r)\3/,lookbehind:!0,greedy:!0,inside:{bash:a}},{pattern:/(^|[^\\](?:\\\\)*)"(?:\\[\s\S]|\$\([^)]+\)|\$(?!\()|`[^`]+`|[^"\\`$])*"/,lookbehind:!0,greedy:!0,inside:n},{pattern:/(^|[^$\\])'[^']*'/,lookbehind:!0,greedy:!0},{pattern:/\$'(?:[^'\\]|\\[\s\S])*'/,greedy:!0,inside:{entity:n.entity}}],environment:{pattern:RegExp("\\$?"+t),alias:"constant"},variable:n.variable,function:{pattern:/(^|[\s;|&]|[<>]\()(?:add|apropos|apt|apt-cache|apt-get|aptitude|aspell|automysqlbackup|awk|basename|bash|bc|bconsole|bg|bzip2|cal|cargo|cat|cfdisk|chgrp|chkconfig|chmod|chown|chroot|cksum|clear|cmp|column|comm|composer|cp|cron|crontab|csplit|curl|cut|date|dc|dd|ddrescue|debootstrap|df|diff|diff3|dig|dir|dircolors|dirname|dirs|dmesg|docker|docker-compose|du|egrep|eject|env|ethtool|expand|expect|expr|fdformat|fdisk|fg|fgrep|file|find|fmt|fold|format|free|fsck|ftp|fuser|gawk|git|gparted|grep|groupadd|groupdel|groupmod|groups|grub-mkconfig|gzip|halt|head|hg|history|host|hostname|htop|iconv|id|ifconfig|ifdown|ifup|import|install|ip|java|jobs|join|kill|killall|less|link|ln|locate|logname|logrotate|look|lpc|lpr|lprint|lprintd|lprintq|lprm|ls|lsof|lynx|make|man|mc|mdadm|mkconfig|mkdir|mke2fs|mkfifo|mkfs|mkisofs|mknod|mkswap|mmv|more|most|mount|mtools|mtr|mutt|mv|nano|nc|netstat|nice|nl|node|nohup|notify-send|npm|nslookup|op|open|parted|passwd|paste|pathchk|ping|pkill|pnpm|podman|podman-compose|popd|pr|printcap|printenv|ps|pushd|pv|quota|quotacheck|quotactl|ram|rar|rcp|reboot|remsync|rename|renice|rev|rm|rmdir|rpm|rsync|scp|screen|sdiff|sed|sendmail|seq|service|sftp|sh|shellcheck|shuf|shutdown|sleep|slocate|sort|split|ssh|stat|strace|su|sudo|sum|suspend|swapon|sync|sysctl|tac|tail|tar|tee|time|timeout|top|touch|tr|traceroute|tsort|tty|umount|uname|unexpand|uniq|units|unrar|unshar|unzip|update-grub|uptime|useradd|userdel|usermod|users|uudecode|uuencode|v|vcpkg|vdir|vi|vim|virsh|vmstat|wait|watch|wc|wget|whereis|which|who|whoami|write|xargs|xdg-open|yarn|yes|zenity|zip|zsh|zypper)(?=$|[)\s;|&])/,lookbehind:!0},keyword:{pattern:/(^|[\s;|&]|[<>]\()(?:case|do|done|elif|else|esac|fi|for|function|if|in|select|then|until|while)(?=$|[)\s;|&])/,lookbehind:!0},builtin:{pattern:/(^|[\s;|&]|[<>]\()(?:\.|:|alias|bind|break|builtin|caller|cd|command|continue|declare|echo|enable|eval|exec|exit|export|getopts|hash|help|let|local|logout|mapfile|printf|pwd|read|readarray|readonly|return|set|shift|shopt|source|test|times|trap|type|typeset|ulimit|umask|unalias|unset)(?=$|[)\s;|&])/,lookbehind:!0,alias:"class-name"},boolean:{pattern:/(^|[\s;|&]|[<>]\()(?:false|true)(?=$|[)\s;|&])/,lookbehind:!0},"file-descriptor":{pattern:/\B&\d\b/,alias:"important"},operator:{pattern:/\d?<>|>\||\+=|=[=~]?|!=?|<<[<-]?|[&\d]?>>|\d[<>]&?|[<>][&=]?|&[>&]?|\|[&|]?/,inside:{"file-descriptor":{pattern:/^\d/,alias:"important"}}},punctuation:/\$?\(\(?|\)\)?|\.\.|[{}[\];\\]/,number:{pattern:/(^|\s)(?:[1-9]\d*|0)(?:[.,]\d+)?\b/,lookbehind:!0}},a.inside=e.languages.bash;for(var s=["comment","function-name","for-or-select","assign-left","parameter","string","environment","function","keyword","builtin","boolean","file-descriptor","operator","punctuation","number"],o=n.variable[1].inside,i=0;i<s.length;i++)o[s[i]]=e.languages.bash[s[i]];e.languages.sh=e.languages.bash,e.languages.shell=e.languages.bash}(Prism);
02\ No newline at end of file
priv/spec_review_assets/prism-css.min.js
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
1+!function(s){var e=/(?:"(?:\\(?:\r\n|[\s\S])|[^"\\\r\n])*"|'(?:\\(?:\r\n|[\s\S])|[^'\\\r\n])*')/;s.languages.css={comment:/\/\*[\s\S]*?\*\//,atrule:{pattern:RegExp("@[\\w-](?:[^;{\\s\"']|\\s+(?!\\s)|"+e.source+")*?(?:;|(?=\\s*\\{))"),inside:{rule:/^@[\w-]+/,"selector-function-argument":{pattern:/(\bselector\s*\(\s*(?![\s)]))(?:[^()\s]|\s+(?![\s)])|\((?:[^()]|\([^()]*\))*\))+(?=\s*\))/,lookbehind:!0,alias:"selector"},keyword:{pattern:/(^|[^\w-])(?:and|not|only|or)(?![\w-])/,lookbehind:!0}}},url:{pattern:RegExp("\\burl\\((?:"+e.source+"|(?:[^\\\\\r\n()\"']|\\\\[^])*)\\)","i"),greedy:!0,inside:{function:/^url/i,punctuation:/^\(|\)$/,string:{pattern:RegExp("^"+e.source+"$"),alias:"url"}}},selector:{pattern:RegExp("(^|[{}\\s])[^{}\\s](?:[^{};\"'\\s]|\\s+(?![\\s{])|"+e.source+")*(?=\\s*\\{)"),lookbehind:!0},string:{pattern:e,greedy:!0},property:{pattern:/(^|[^-\w\xA0-\uFFFF])(?!\s)[-_a-z\xA0-\uFFFF](?:(?!\s)[-\w\xA0-\uFFFF])*(?=\s*:)/i,lookbehind:!0},important:/!important\b/i,function:{pattern:/(^|[^-a-z0-9])[-a-z0-9]+(?=\()/i,lookbehind:!0},punctuation:/[(){};:,]/},s.languages.css.atrule.inside.rest=s.languages.css;var t=s.languages.markup;t&&(t.tag.addInlined("style","css"),t.tag.addAttribute("style","css"))}(Prism);

1+!function(e){e.languages.diff={coord:[/^(?:\*{3}|-{3}|\+{3}).*$/m,/^@@.*@@$/m,/^\d.*$/m]};var n={"deleted-sign":"-","deleted-arrow":"<","inserted-sign":"+","inserted-arrow":">",unchanged:" ",diff:"!"};Object.keys(n).forEach((function(a){var i=n[a],r=[];/^\w+$/.test(a)||r.push(/\w+/.exec(a)[0]),"diff"===a&&r.push("bold"),e.languages.diff[a]={pattern:RegExp("^(?:["+i+"].*(?:\r\n?|\n|(?![\\s\\S])))+","m"),alias:r,inside:{line:{pattern:/(.)(?=[\s\S]).*(?:\r\n?|\n)?/,lookbehind:!0},prefix:{pattern:/[\s\S]/,alias:/\w+/.exec(a)[0]}}}})),Object.defineProperty(e.languages.diff,"PREFIXES",{value:n})}(Prism);

priv/spec_review_assets/prism-elixir.min.js
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
1+Prism.languages.elixir={doc:{pattern:/@(?:doc|moduledoc)\s+(?:("""|''')[\s\S]*?\1|("|')(?:\\(?:\r\n|[\s\S])|(?!\2)[^\\\r\n])*\2)/,inside:{attribute:/^@\w+/,string:/['"][\s\S]+/}},comment:{pattern:/#.*/,greedy:!0},regex:{pattern:/~[rR](?:("""|''')(?:\\[\s\S]|(?!\1)[^\\])+\1|([\/|"'])(?:\\.|(?!\2)[^\\\r\n])+\2|\((?:\\.|[^\\)\r\n])+\)|\[(?:\\.|[^\\\]\r\n])+\]|\{(?:\\.|[^\\}\r\n])+\}|<(?:\\.|[^\\>\r\n])+>)[uismxfr]*/,greedy:!0},string:[{pattern:/~[cCsSwW](?:("""|''')(?:\\[\s\S]|(?!\1)[^\\])+\1|([\/|"'])(?:\\.|(?!\2)[^\\\r\n])+\2|\((?:\\.|[^\\)\r\n])+\)|\[(?:\\.|[^\\\]\r\n])+\]|\{(?:\\.|#\{[^}]+\}|#(?!\{)|[^#\\}\r\n])+\}|<(?:\\.|[^\\>\r\n])+>)[csa]?/,greedy:!0,inside:{}},{pattern:/("""|''')[\s\S]*?\1/,greedy:!0,inside:{}},{pattern:/("|')(?:\\(?:\r\n|[\s\S])|(?!\1)[^\\\r\n])*\1/,greedy:!0,inside:{}}],atom:{pattern:/(^|[^:]):\w+/,lookbehind:!0,alias:"symbol"},module:{pattern:/\b[A-Z]\w*\b/,alias:"class-name"},"attr-name":/\b\w+\??:(?!:)/,argument:{pattern:/(^|[^&])&\d+/,lookbehind:!0,alias:"variable"},attribute:{pattern:/@\w+/,alias:"variable"},function:/\b[_a-zA-Z]\w*[?!]?(?:(?=\s*(?:\.\s*)?\()|(?=\/\d))/,number:/\b(?:0[box][a-f\d_]+|\d[\d_]*)(?:\.[\d_]+)?(?:e[+-]?[\d_]+)?\b/i,keyword:/\b(?:after|alias|and|case|catch|cond|def(?:callback|delegate|exception|impl|macro|module|n|np|p|protocol|struct)?|do|else|end|fn|for|if|import|not|or|quote|raise|require|rescue|try|unless|unquote|use|when)\b/,boolean:/\b(?:false|nil|true)\b/,operator:[/\bin\b|&&?|\|[|>]?|\\\\|::|\.\.\.?|\+\+?|-[->]?|<[-=>]|>=|!==?|\B!|=(?:==?|[>~])?|[*\/^]/,{pattern:/([^<])<(?!<)/,lookbehind:!0},{pattern:/([^>])>(?!>)/,lookbehind:!0}],punctuation:/<<|>>|[.,%\[\]{}()]/},Prism.languages.elixir.string.forEach((function(e){e.inside={interpolation:{pattern:/#\{[^}]+\}/,inside:{delimiter:{pattern:/^#\{|\}$/,alias:"punctuation"},rest:Prism.languages.elixir}}}}));
02\ No newline at end of file
priv/spec_review_assets/prism-erlang.min.js
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
